name: Curried Spinach & Chick Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and saute garlic for 1 minute.
2. Add carrot, barley, bay leaf, and 2 1/2 cups stock to the pot. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Puree half of the chick peas and add them along with the spinach, zucchini, and seasonings (curry powder, thyme, cumin, salt, and pepper) back into the pot. Simmer covered for another 10 minutes.
4. Add the remaining chick peas, the other 2 cups stock, and lemon juice to the pot. Gently simmer for another 15 minutes until the barley is tender.
